reasoning: The Lean statement faithfully encodes the informal claim. The summand expression exactly mirrors sin((2k-1)π/(2n)) / (cos²((k-1)π/(2n)) · cos²(kπ/(2n))). The limit `Tendsto (fun n => (a n)/n^3) atTop (𝓝 (8/π^3))` captures lim_{n→∞} a_n/n^3 = 8/π³ — finitely many boundary values (n = 0 where 0/0 = 0) don't affect the `atTop` filter limit. The solution value 8/π³ matches the known Putnam 2019 B2 answer. No hypotheses are added, dropped, or weakened.
